title: T-078 — UX implementation red-lines: factory_spec, BOM SSOT, RM usability, PO/TO and optional D365
prompt:
# T-078 — UX implementation red-lines: factory_spec, BOM SSOT, RM usability, PO/TO and optional D365

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §0, §5.1A, §7.4, prototypes/design/03-TECHNICAL-UX.md §0A
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
UI governance red-lines applied to Technical prototype-derived implementation tasks.

Use this as a UI governance task for ACP agents. Existing prototype labels may contain FA/PR or D365-first assumptions; agents must preserve layout and interactions while correcting domain copy and blocking states per PRD v3.3. For BOM detail, prototype path `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:650-930` is the visual anchor; for modals, use `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:94-180` and `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:371-475` where relevant. T-083 provides the local production copy/guard red-line overlay and must be treated as the concrete checklist for UI closeout copy assertions.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- prototypes/design/03-TECHNICAL-UX.md [create]
- _meta/atomic-tasks/03-technical/tasks/T-032..T-063.json [create]
- _meta/atomic-tasks/03-technical/tasks/T-083.json [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a UI implementation references `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:650-930`, then it preserves structural, visual and interaction parity while showing FG/WIP naming and the active-edit creates new draft approval banner.
2. Given a BOM component modal references `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:133-170`, then it preserves structural, visual and interaction parity while adding the RM usability check rows.
3. Given D365 UI references `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:475-540`, then it preserves structural, visual and interaction parity and includes a disabled optional-integration state.
4. Given any Supplier Specs or Lab Results tab is implemented, then copy states supplier_specs are Technical Phase 1 master data and lab status is Quality-owned read-only.
5. Given T-083 red-line overlay exists, then UI task closeout references it and proves legacy copy/D365-first wording was not carried from prototypes into production UI.
6. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy
- For each UI task closeout, require screenshot/DOM assertions for legacy prototype parity plus domain red-line assertions.
- Run the UI task-specific vitest/playwright command named in that task.
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not rewrite prototype files for visual churn.
- Do not keep FA/PR in production copy except when showing legacy imported source values.
- Do not make this governance task a standalone screen implementation.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to production shadcn primitives per `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md`.
- Do not use raw HTML <select> — use shadcn Select.
- Do not use inline styles — use Tailwind classes; conditional via cn()/cva().
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (ESLint guard).

## Prototype parity
- Evidence policy: `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` — closeout must include screenshot artifacts + Playwright trace/video where applicable, plus axe results or documented blocker.
